subcodes.first_line: O servant of Baha! How joyous, how blessed art thou, that thou hast turned thyself unto the manifest Light, hast drunk from the fountainhead of certitude, and attained unto truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء خوشا خوشا که به نور مبین توجه نمودی و از عین الیقین نوشیدی و حق
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight
